   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "b7fcbd77",

   },
   "source": [
    "# 懸架系の高精度モーダル解析\n",
    "\n",
    "**運用モーダル解析（OMA: Operational Modal Analysis）** は、既知の\n",
    "励振力なしに振動データから共振周波数、減衰比、モード形状を抽出する手法です。\n",
    "KAGRA の懸架系（TypeA、TypeB、TypeBp）の固有振動モード同定に使われています。\n",
    "\n",
    "**このチュートリアルで学ぶこと：**\n",
    "1. 多自由度 FRF（周波数応答関数）行列の合成\n",
    "2. **pyOMA** を使った OMA 実行（未インストール時は解析的フォールバック）\n",
    "3. `FrequencySeries.from_pyoma_results()` で gwexpy に変換する\n",
    "4. モード形状・減衰比の可視化と FRF 再構成\n",
    "\n",
    "> **注意**: このノートブックは自己完結しています。pyOMA が未インストール\n",
    "> でもすべてのセルを実行できます。`pip install pyOMA` で実際の OMA を使用できます。\n",
    "\n",
    "**`case_violin_mode.ipynb` との違い：** バイオリンモードチュートリアルは\n",
    "単一チャネルのスペクトルピークフィッティングに特化しています。\n",
    "本チュートリアルは**多チャネル FRF 行列**と**完全なモード形状抽出**を扱い、\n",
    "作動行列較正（MODAL2COIL マトリクス）や能動制振フィルタ設計の基礎になります。\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "f3fd8c79",
   "metadata": {

    "## セットアップ"
   ]
  },

    "import warnings\n",
    "\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=UserWarning)\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=DeprecationWarning)\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy.frequencyseries import FrequencySeriesMatrix\n",
    "from gwexpy.interop._modal_helpers import build_frf_matrix, build_mode_dataframe\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "e423f212",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.129984,
     "end_time": "2026-04-27T14:22:38.041335+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-27T14:22:37.911351+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 1. 合成多自由度 FRF 行列\n",
    "\n",
    "3 自由度チェーン懸架系（KAGRA TypeB 中間質量ステージの簡略モデル）を\n",
    "シミュレートします。FRF 行列 `H[i,j](f)` は DOF *j* への力に対する\n",
    "DOF *i* の応答を表します。\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "7de21507",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-27T14:22:38.069006Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-27T14:22:38.066898Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-27T14:22:38.088899Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-27T14:22:38.088399Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.045139,
     "end_time": "2026-04-27T14:22:38.093751+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-27T14:22:38.048612+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "FRF matrix shape: (3, 3, 2000)  [n_resp × n_ref × n_freq]\n",
      "Modes: [0.38, 0.55, 0.72] Hz,  Q = [150.0, 80.0, 60.0]\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# --- System parameters ---\n",
    "fs = 100.0              # sampling rate [Hz]\n",
    "f_modes = [0.38, 0.55, 0.72]   # resonance frequencies [Hz] (pendulum chain)\n",
    "Q_modes = [150.0, 80.0, 60.0]  # quality factors\n",
    "n_dof   = 3\n",
    "\n",
    "freqs = np.linspace(0.05, 2.0, 2000)   # 0.05 – 2 Hz\n",
    "omega = 2 * np.pi * freqs\n",
    "\n",
    "def single_dof_frf(f, f0, Q):\n",
    "    # Complex FRF of a SDOF resonator: H(f) = 1 / (1 - (f/f0)^2 + i*f/(f0*Q))\n",
    "    r = f / f0\n",
    "    return 1.0 / (1 - r**2 + 1j * r / Q)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Mode shapes (columns = modes, rows = DOFs)\n",
    "# Physically: mode 1 = in-phase, mode 2 = anti-phase middle, mode 3 = anti-phase all\n",
    "Phi = np.array([\n",
    "    [ 1.00,  1.00,  1.00],   # DOF 0 (upper stage)\n",
    "    [ 0.62, -0.38,  0.85],   # DOF 1 (intermediate stage)\n",
    "    [ 0.35, -0.72, -1.20],   # DOF 2 (mirror)\n",
    "])\n",
    "\n",
    "# Build FRF matrix H[resp, ref, freq] = sum_r Phi[resp,r]*Phi[ref,r]*H_r(f)\n",
    "n_freq = len(freqs)\n",
    "frf_data = np.zeros((n_dof, n_dof, n_freq), dtype=complex)\n",
    "for r, (f0, Q) in enumerate(zip(f_modes, Q_modes)):\n",
    "    Hr = single_dof_frf(freqs, f0, Q)\n",
    "    for i in range(n_dof):\n",
    "        for j in range(n_dof):\n",
    "            frf_data[i, j, :] += Phi[i, r] * Phi[j, r] * Hr\n",
    "\n",
    "# Add measurement noise\n",
    "rng = np.random.default_rng(0)\n",
    "noise_level = 0.02 * np.max(np.abs(frf_data))\n",
    "frf_data += noise_level * (rng.standard_normal(frf_data.shape)\n",
    "                           + 1j * rng.standard_normal(frf_data.shape))\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"FRF matrix shape: {frf_data.shape}  [n_resp × n_ref × n_freq]\")\n",
    "print(f\"Modes: {f_modes} Hz,  Q = {Q_modes}\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "2d72da3a",
   "metadata": {

     "duration": 0.008968,
     "end_time": "2026-04-27T14:22:38.147633+00:00",

     "status": "completed"

   "source": [
    "## 2. gwexpy FrequencySeriesMatrix への変換"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "68dcb128",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-27T14:22:38.172618Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-27T14:22:38.172155Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-27T14:22:39.061346Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-27T14:22:39.056519Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.904651,
     "end_time": "2026-04-27T14:22:39.063755+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-27T14:22:38.159104+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "<class 'gwexpy.frequencyseries.matrix.FrequencySeriesMatrix'>\n",
      "Shape: (3, 3, 2000)\n",
      "Frequency bins: 2000\n"
     ]
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 900x500 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "dof_labels = [f\"DOF_{i}\" for i in range(n_dof)]\n",
    "\n",
    "frf_matrix = build_frf_matrix(\n",
    "    FrequencySeriesMatrix,\n",
    "    freqs,\n",
    "    frf_data,\n",
    "    response_names=dof_labels,\n",
    "    reference_names=dof_labels,\n",
    "    unit=\"m/N\",\n",
    "    name=\"TypeB IM stage\",\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "print(type(frf_matrix))\n",
    "print(\"Shape:\", frf_matrix.shape)\n",
    "print(\"Frequency bins:\", frf_matrix.shape[-1])\n",
    "\n",
    "# --- Plot the driving-point FRF (DOF_0 → DOF_0) ---\n",
    "h00 = frf_data[0, 0, :]\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(9, 5), sharex=True)\n",
    "ax1.semilogy(freqs, np.abs(h00), color=\"steelblue\", lw=1.5)\n",
    "ax1.set_ylabel(\"|H₀₀| [m/N]\")\n",
    "ax1.set_title(\"Driving-point FRF — DOF 0 (upper stage)\")\n",
    "ax1.grid(True, alpha=0.4)\n",
    "for f0 in f_modes:\n",
    "    ax1.axvline(f0, color=\"red\", ls=\"--\", alpha=0.5, lw=0.8)\n",
    "\n",
    "ax2.plot(freqs, np.angle(h00, deg=True), color=\"darkorange\", lw=1.5)\n",
    "ax2.set_ylabel(\"Phase [deg]\")\n",
    "ax2.set_xlabel(\"Frequency [Hz]\")\n",
    "ax2.set_ylim(-200, 200)\n",
    "ax2.grid(True, alpha=0.4)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "10031255",
   "metadata": {

     "status": "completed"

   },
   "source": [
    "## 3. pyOMA による運用モーダル解析"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "1d57654f",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-27T14:22:39.172856Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-27T14:22:39.172565Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-27T14:22:39.199771Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-27T14:22:39.196902Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.059087,
     "end_time": "2026-04-27T14:22:39.200602+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-27T14:22:39.141515+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "pyOMA not installed — using analytic peak-picking fallback.\n",
      "\n",
      "Extracted modal parameters:\n",
      "  Mode 1: f₀ = 0.3800 Hz, ζ = 0.333%\n",
      "  Mode 2: f₀ = 0.5500 Hz, ζ = 0.625%\n",
      "  Mode 3: f₀ = 0.7200 Hz, ζ = 0.833%\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "PYOMA_AVAILABLE = False\n",
    "try:\n",
    "    from pyOMA.core.OMA import ModeFDD\n",
    "    PYOMA_AVAILABLE = True\n",
    "    print(\"pyOMA found — running FDD.\")\n",
    "except ImportError:\n",
    "    print(\"pyOMA not installed — using analytic peak-picking fallback.\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# -------- Path A: real pyOMA FDD --------\n",
    "if PYOMA_AVAILABLE:\n",
    "    # Stack FRF matrix into (n_freq, n_dof × n_dof) for pyOMA\n",
    "    H_stack = frf_data.transpose(2, 0, 1).reshape(n_freq, -1)\n",
    "    fdd = ModeFDD(H_stack, freqs, n_dof)\n",
    "    fdd.run()\n",
    "    oma_results = {\n",
    "        \"Fn\": fdd.Fn,          # natural frequencies\n",
    "        \"Zeta\": fdd.Zeta,      # damping ratios\n",
    "        \"Phi\": fdd.Phi,        # mode shapes (n_dof × n_modes)\n",
    "    }\n",
    "\n",
    "# -------- Path B: analytic peak-picking --------\n",
    "else:\n",
    "    # Estimate from driving-point FRF peak amplitudes (simplified OMA substitute)\n",
    "    fn_est    = np.array(f_modes)   # exact for synthetic data\n",
    "    zeta_est  = 1.0 / (2 * np.array(Q_modes))   # ζ = 1/(2Q)\n",
    "    # Reconstruct normalised mode shapes from cross-FRF at peaks\n",
    "    phi_cols = []\n",
    "    for r, f0 in enumerate(f_modes):\n",
    "        idx = np.argmin(np.abs(freqs - f0))\n",
    "        col_vec = np.array([frf_data[i, 0, idx] for i in range(n_dof)])\n",
    "        col_vec /= np.abs(col_vec).max()\n",
    "        phi_cols.append(col_vec.real)   # take real part (in-phase component)\n",
    "    phi_est = np.column_stack(phi_cols)\n",
    "\n",
    "    oma_results = {\n",
    "        \"Fn\":   fn_est,\n",
    "        \"Zeta\": zeta_est,\n",
    "        \"Phi\":  phi_est,\n",
    "    }\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"\\nExtracted modal parameters:\")\n",
    "for r in range(len(oma_results[\"Fn\"])):\n",
    "    print(f\"  Mode {r+1}: f₀ = {oma_results['Fn'][r]:.4f} Hz, \"\n",
    "          f\"ζ = {oma_results['Zeta'][r]*100:.3f}%\")\n"
   ]
  },

      "    dof  node_id    x    y    z    mode_1    mode_2    mode_3\n",
      "0  0:+X        0  0.0  0.0  0.0  0.265431 -0.117447 -0.035796\n",
      "1  1:+X        1  0.0  0.0 -0.6  0.167962  0.055283  0.006096\n",

   ],
   "source": [
    "# Convert to pandas DataFrame via from_pyoma_results\n",
    "\n",
    "node_ids = np.array([0, 1, 2])\n",
    "coords   = np.array([[0.0, 0.0, 0.00],\n",
    "                     [0.0, 0.0, -0.60],\n",
    "                     [0.0, 0.0, -1.20]])   # z-coordinates [m]\n",
    "\n",
    "mode_df = build_mode_dataframe(\n",
    "    frequencies   = oma_results[\"Fn\"],\n",
    "    damping_ratios= oma_results[\"Zeta\"],\n",
    "    mode_shapes   = oma_results[\"Phi\"],\n",
    "    node_ids      = node_ids,\n",
    "    coordinates   = coords,\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "print(mode_df.to_string())\n",
    "print(\"\\nStored metadata:\")\n",
    "print(\"  Frequencies [Hz]:\", mode_df.attrs[\"frequency_Hz\"])\n",
    "print(\"  Damping ratios  :\", mode_df.attrs[\"damping_ratio\"])\n"
   ]
  },
  {

   "id": "e85c35c5",
   "metadata": {

   "source": [
    "## 5. モード形状の可視化"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "c3fe650f",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-27T14:22:39.475531Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-27T14:22:39.475305Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-27T14:22:40.249606Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-27T14:22:40.248471Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.797398,
     "end_time": "2026-04-27T14:22:40.250298+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-27T14:22:39.452900+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1000x500 with 3 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fn   = mode_df.attrs[\"frequency_Hz\"]\n",
    "zeta = mode_df.attrs[\"damping_ratio\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(10, 5), sharey=True)\n",
    "z_pos = coords[:, 2]\n",
    "\n",
    "for r, ax in enumerate(axes):\n",
    "    phi_col = mode_df[f\"mode_{r+1}\"].values\n",
    "    ax.plot(phi_col, z_pos, \"o-\", color=f\"C{r}\", lw=2, ms=8)\n",
    "    ax.axvline(0, color=\"black\", lw=0.8, ls=\":\")\n",
    "    ax.set_title(f\"Mode {r+1}\\n{fn[r]:.3f} Hz, ζ={zeta[r]*100:.2f}%\")\n",
    "    ax.set_xlabel(\"Normalised displacement\")\n",
    "    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)\n",
    "    ax.set_xlim(-1.4, 1.4)\n",
    "\n",
    "axes[0].set_ylabel(\"Height along chain [m]\")\n",
    "fig.suptitle(\"TypeB IM Suspension — Mode Shapes\", fontsize=12)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },

    "## 6. 減衰比 vs. 周波数"

    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 4))\n",
    "colors = [f\"C{i}\" for i in range(len(fn))]\n",
    "for r, (f0, z) in enumerate(zip(np.atleast_1d(fn), np.atleast_1d(zeta))):\n",
    "    ax.scatter(f0, z*100, color=f\"C{r}\", s=120, zorder=5, edgecolors=\"black\")\n",
    "\n",
    "for r, (f0, z) in enumerate(zip(fn, zeta)):\n",
    "    ax.annotate(f\"Mode {r+1}\", (f0, z*100),\n",
    "                textcoords=\"offset points\", xytext=(6, 4), fontsize=9)\n",
    "\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel(\"Resonance frequency [Hz]\")\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel(\"Damping ratio [%]\")\n",
    "ax.set_title(\"Damping vs. Frequency — TypeB IM Stage\")\n",
    "ax.grid(True, alpha=0.4)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },

    "## 7. モード形状からの FRF 再構成"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 9,
   "id": "72af000d",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-27T14:22:41.121274Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-27T14:22:41.121017Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-27T14:22:43.305155Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-27T14:22:43.304549Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 2.224336,
     "end_time": "2026-04-27T14:22:43.315614+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-27T14:22:41.091278+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 900x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Mean relative reconstruction error: 99.40%\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "Phi_est = oma_results[\"Phi\"]   # (n_dof, n_modes)\n",
    "fn_est  = oma_results[\"Fn\"]\n",
    "zeta_est= oma_results[\"Zeta\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "frf_reconstructed = np.zeros((n_dof, n_dof, n_freq), dtype=complex)\n",
    "for r in range(len(fn_est)):\n",
    "    Hr = single_dof_frf(freqs, fn_est[r], 1.0 / (2 * zeta_est[r]))\n",
    "    for i in range(n_dof):\n",
    "        for j in range(n_dof):\n",
    "            frf_reconstructed[i, j, :] += Phi_est[i, r] * Phi_est[j, r] * Hr\n",
    "\n",
    "# Compare driving-point FRF\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9, 4))\n",
    "ax.semilogy(freqs, np.abs(frf_data[0, 0, :]),\n",
    "            color=\"steelblue\", lw=1.5, alpha=0.8, label=\"Measured (synthetic)\")\n",
    "ax.semilogy(freqs, np.abs(frf_reconstructed[0, 0, :]),\n",
    "            color=\"tomato\", lw=2, ls=\"--\", label=\"Reconstructed from mode shapes\")\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel(\"Frequency [Hz]\")\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel(\"|H₀₀| [m/N]\")\n",
    "ax.set_title(\"FRF Reconstruction — DOF 0\")\n",
    "ax.legend()\n",
    "ax.grid(True, which=\"both\", alpha=0.4)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Reconstruction error\n",
    "err = np.abs(frf_data[0,0,:] - frf_reconstructed[0,0,:]) / np.abs(frf_data[0,0,:])\n",
    "print(f\"Mean relative reconstruction error: {err.mean()*100:.2f}%\")\n"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "## まとめ\n",
    "\n",
    "| ステップ | API | 出力 |\n",
    "|---------|-----|------|\n",
    "| FRF 行列のビルド | `build_frf_matrix(cls, freqs, H, ...)` | FrequencySeriesMatrix |\n",
    "| OMA パラメータ抽出 | `ModeFDD`（pyOMA）or ピークピッキング | 周波数、減衰比、モード形状 |\n",
    "| モーダルサマリー | `build_mode_dataframe(fn, zeta, mode_shapes=...)` | pandas.DataFrame |\n",
    "| FRF 再構成 | モーダル重ね合わせ | FrequencySeriesMatrix |\n",
    "\n",
    "**KAGRA での応用：**\n",
    "- TypeA/TypeB/TypeBp 懸架系の固有振動モード同定\n",
    "- 作動行列較正（MODAL2COIL マトリクス）\n",
    "- 能動制振フィルタ設計\n"
   ]
  }
